tracks.meaning: the act of traveling through the air from one place to another, typically in an aircraft
a scheduled journey of an aircraft between two or more destinations
a group of muscles or nerve fibers that work together to produce movement
the act of fleeing or escaping from a place or situation
a tactical maneuver by an aircraft or military unit to evade enemy fire
the instinctive response to retreat or escape when faced with danger or stress
a sudden departure or quick escape
a set of steps or staircase, particularly in informal usage
the act of birds moving through the air using their wings
a rapid sequence of choreographed movements or formations in a dance or performance
a short period or stretch of time, as in 'in flight' meaning during the course of something
